SEARCH
Package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

Interface EMediplanIdentifier

All Superinterfaces:
EMediplanObject
All Known Implementing Classes:
ChMed16APatientId, ChMed23APatientId
public interface EMediplanIdentifier extends EMediplanObject
Extension of the EMediplanObject interface that adds a method to convert an eMediplan object translatable to a FHIR Identifier to such an identifier.
